arguments.task: Visit the official SE Ranking API page and official SE Ranking website only. Find first-party evidence for: API authentication method, whether access is self-serve or gated/paid, API surface type (REST or GraphQL), breadth of available endpoints/features, rate limits, and any official links to docs, pricing, changelog, GitHub, or MCP/server integrations. Return the exact URLs visited and concise extracted findings with quotes where available. Do not use third-party sites unless needed only to check SE Ranking's official GitHub organization for an MCP server, and prefer official pages.

input.thought: Browse official SE Ranking properties to verify API availability, auth, access, and related developer evidence.

raw_result.description: SEO platform with a public API for rankings, backlinks, site audit, competitive research, and project data.
raw_result.auth_notes: Core REST API docs describe API key access via the "Getting API access" flow; official MCP integration page additionally states the MCP server supports OAuth 2.1 or manual API key entry.
raw_result.gating_reason: Official docs state API access is included in every SE Ranking plan, and pricing shows self-serve API options including free-trial/entry options; some high-volume Enterprise API plans are contact-oriented but not required for initial access.

api_surface.breadth: Public REST API documentation covers multiple SEO datasets and project features, including rankings/project data, backlinks, competitive/domain analysis, keyword-related research, and other SEO endpoints; official MCP page claims 160+ tools exposed via their MCP server.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official SE Ranking MCP integration page advertises an MCP server at api.seranking.com/mcp, and the gathered evidence also points to an official GitHub repository under the seranking organization for related SEO skills/MCP assets.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate-limits page indicates 10 requests/second for Data API, 5 requests/second for Project API, and 1 request/second for trial accounts.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs explicitly say API access is included in every SE Ranking plan; API pricing offers Wallet/pay-as-you-go, Standalone, Add-on, and Enterprise options; official MCP integration is documented and marketed as supporting OAuth 2.1 plus 160+ tools.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Most fields are supported by official SE Ranking pages, but the exact official GitHub repository URL for the MCP/skills asset was not captured directly in the gathered evidence, and the access-tier classification is slightly ambiguous because self-serve plans coexist with enterprise-oriented API offerings.

result.description: SEO platform with a public API for rankings, backlinks, site audit, competitive research, and project data.
result.auth_notes: Core REST API docs describe API key access via the "Getting API access" flow; official MCP integration page additionally states the MCP server supports OAuth 2.1 or manual API key entry.
result.gating_reason: Official docs state API access is included in every SE Ranking plan, and pricing shows self-serve API options including free-trial/entry options; some high-volume Enterprise API plans are contact-oriented but not required for initial access.

api_surface.breadth: Public REST API documentation covers multiple SEO datasets and project features, including rankings/project data, backlinks, competitive/domain analysis, keyword-related research, and other SEO endpoints; official MCP page claims 160+ tools exposed via their MCP server.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official SE Ranking MCP integration page advertises an MCP server at api.seranking.com/mcp, and the gathered evidence also points to an official GitHub repository under the seranking organization for related SEO skills/MCP assets.

result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate-limits page indicates 10 requests/second for Data API, 5 requests/second for Project API, and 1 request/second for trial accounts.
result.notable_signals: Official docs explicitly say API access is included in every SE Ranking plan; API pricing offers Wallet/pay-as-you-go, Standalone, Add-on, and Enterprise options; official MCP integration is documented and marketed as supporting OAuth 2.1 plus 160+ tools.
result.human_review_reason: Most fields are supported by official SE Ranking pages, but the exact official GitHub repository URL for the MCP/skills asset was not captured directly in the gathered evidence, and the access-tier classification is slightly ambiguous because self-serve plans coexist with enterprise-oriented API offerings.
